description_long: This is a medium-sized, rectangular brown backpack with a flap-over top secured by a central strap and a metallic buckle. The main body is constructed from a matte, fabric-like material, giving it a soft yet structured appearance. A single, wide shoulder strap is attached at the sides, designed for crossbody or over-the-shoulder carrying. There is a small, oval patch on the front flap, possibly for branding or decoration, but no visible text or logo. The backpack appears to have a single main compartment, with no visible zippers or external pockets. The overall design is minimalistic and functional, suitable for everyday urban use.
description: A brown, rectangular backpack with a flap closure, single wide strap, and a metallic buckle. Minimalistic design with a small oval patch on the front.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the flap closure, metallic buckle, oval patch, and the attachment of the wide shoulder strap.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the back panel and the full length of the wide shoulder strap, with no visible pockets or decorations.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the thickness of the backpack and the attachment points of the strap, with the flap slightly open at the top.
description_view_3: Direct front view focusing on the flap, buckle, and oval patch, with the strap draped across the front.
attribute_strap_design: Single wide, adjustable shoulder strap attached at both sides, made of the same material as the bag, no visible padding or chest strap.
attribute_pocket_configuration: One main compartment under the flap, no visible external or internal pockets.
attribute_decorative_elements: Small oval patch on the front flap, metallic buckle; otherwise, none.
